def negative_dict_copy_in_loop_same_source():
    rule_id = "dict_copy_in_loop_same_source"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "A dict-like source is copied on each loop iteration instead of being reused or hoisted."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
